title: Browse the home page and enter the menu builder
description: This verifies that a visitor can explore the home page sections and reach the menu builder from the landing page.

steps.description: Scroll through the home page sections
Scroll through the lower informational sections
Verify the menu builder is displayed

title: Build a pizza tray on desktop
description: This verifies that a desktop visitor can choose a tray size, place a pizza into an available zone, and see the order summary reflect the selection.

steps.description: Drag a pizza from the sidebar onto an available tray zone
Verify the selected pizza appears on the tray
Verify the order summary reflects the current configuration

title: Use the mobile pizza selector on a small screen
description: This verifies that a mobile visitor can choose a tray size and use the mobile selector to build a plate with the summary staying in sync.

steps.description: Use the mobile pizza selector to choose a pizza
Verify the selected pizza appears in the builder
Verify the order summary reflects the selection

title: View the restaurant story and featured offerings
description: This verifies that a visitor can review the brand story and featured pizza content on the home page.

steps.description: Scroll to the brand story section
Scroll to the featured offerings section
Verify the brand story content is displayed

title: Find location and contact information
description: This verifies that a visitor can locate the restaurant’s visit and contact details on the home page.

title: Review the order summary after changing selections
description: This verifies that the builder summary updates when a visitor changes their pizza choice during the same session.

steps.description: Drag a pizza from the sidebar onto an available tray zone
Replace the selection with a different pizza
Verify the order summary shows the latest configuration

title: Switch tray size after placing a pizza
description: This verifies that changing the tray size updates the available plate layout and keeps the builder state aligned with the current size.

steps.description: Drag a pizza from the sidebar onto an available tray zone
Verify the tray layout updates for the new size
Verify the order summary updates for the new configuration

title: Open the home page sections in a smooth discovery flow
description: This verifies that a visitor can move through the main promotional sections of the landing page without losing access to the page content.

steps.description: Verify the home page sections are displayed

title: Keep the builder usable with an empty tray
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the menu and inspect the builder before making any selection, with the empty state remaining usable.

steps.description: Verify the tray builder is displayed
Verify an empty tray state is displayed
